title: Alora (Dark Jedi)
content: {{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Twi'lek [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]|[[Alora|the Force-sensitive human]]}} {{Character |type=Dark Jedi |image=[[File:JKAhs_alora.png]] |name=Alora |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],The opening crawl for ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' states that the events of the game occur ten years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places at [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. It can be determined that the events of ''Jedi Academy'' take place during [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. [[Taspir III]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] {{C|[[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]]}}{{CSWECite|I|24-25|Alora}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |skin=Red |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Disciples of Ragnos]] *[[Imperial Remnant]] |masters=[[Tavion Axmis]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Your Force powers are no match for mine!|Alora, to Jaden Korr|}} '''Alora''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] active during the early years of the [[New Jedi Order]]. She was the apprentice of [[Tavion Axmis]], who led the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] cult, a cult that Alora was part of. Alora [[Yavin 4 Incursion|infiltrated]] the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in an attempt to steal a list of locations with significant [[Vergence/Legends|Force nexuses]] to aid the Disciples of Ragnos in their resurrection of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. After the Twi'lek was dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to gather information, Alora encountered and dueled [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] [[Jaden Korr]] within the former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base, [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]. The Dark Jedi was defeated and withdrew, fleeing and traveling to [[Taspir III]], a planet on which she [[Mission to Taspir III|encountered]] Korr and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the initiate. ==Biography== ===Looking for nexuses=== {{Quote|Ah, you must be the saber-wielding troublemaker who neutralized our perimeter guard. Are the Jedi stretched so thin that Skywalker sends ''children'' to battle the Disciples of Ragnos?|Alora, when confronting Jaden Korr for the first time|audio=Alora.flac|}} [[File:JadenVsAlora.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Alora on Hoth, seconds before her first encounter with Jaden Korr]] The [[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] Alora was a member of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] that worshipped the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. She was an apprentice of the cult's leader, [[Tavion Axmis]], by [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] during the cult's effort to resurrect Ragnos with a powerful dark artifact called the [[Scepter of Ragnos]]. As Axmis' most prized apprentice,[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] Alora was tasked with [[Yavin 4 Incursion|infiltrating]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], where Alora stole a list of [[Vergence/Legends|locations]] strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by gaining access to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Computer/Legends|mainframes]]. By travelling to these locations, Axmis would then be able to resurrect Ragnos by siphoning the [[Force energy|Force energies]] into the Sceptre. Accompanied by support from Axmis' allies in the [[Imperial Remnant]], Alora [[Mission to Hoth (Jaden Korr)|travelled]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to gather information on the Force energies located there. While they were searching [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]—a hideout used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]—a [[Unidentified Sith cultist|Sith cultist]] managed to determine from flight trajectories that Skywalker had traveled to the planet [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The [[Sith cultist/Legends|cultist]] downloaded the flight information and transmitted the data to Alora before being [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] [[Jaden Korr]], who was on Hoth as part of an investigation into the locations mentioned in Skywalker's records. Alora relayed the information to Axmis, who congratulated her apprentice and told Alora to meet her on Dagobah, when she was located by Korr in a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] inside the base. Alora engaged Korr in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]], but fled when she realized that she couldn't gain the upper hand. Angered, she taunted Korr as she escaped and claimed they would cross paths again. Alora trained furiously after her defeat on Hoth and adopted a second [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. The next time she [[Mission to Taspir III|encountered]] Korr was on the planet [[Taspir III]], where Korr had travelled with his Master [[Kyle Katarn]] in search of Katarn's other apprentice, [[Rosh Penin]]. Penin had renounced the dark side and was held captive in the Disciples' large [[Taspir III power plant|facility]], where Alora was ensuring that he was secure and unable to escape. Korr's arrival surprised Alora, and she taunted him from various ledges and balconies while leading him on a chase throughout the facility until they reached the hangar where Penin was secured. Korr confronted Penin for his betrayal, and seeing his anger, Alora encouraged Korr to [[Death/Legends|strike Penin down]] and join her and Axmis on the dark side. After Korr let his anger dissipate with Katarn's [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] assistance, Alora realised he would not turn, enraging her and causing her to cut off Penin's [[Limb/Legends|arm]] with her lightsaber. She then attacked Korr and was killed as a result. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You Jedi are blandly predictable. Tavion thought that turning you would gain us an ally. But since you won't be turned, I guess it's up to me to clean up her mistake.|Alora displaying her overconfidence towards Jaden Korr|}} Alora was easily angered and extremely overconfident, a trait encouraged by her Master. Her overconfidence was evident when she first encounted Korr on Hoth, and remarked that Skywalker was sending "children" after the Disciples of Ragnos. The second time she faced Korr, on Taspir III, she crowed that she had learnt many things from Axmis and called him a "sanctimonious fool;" however, her overconfidence proved to be her downfall and she was subsequently killed. She also proved she was quick to anger in how enraged she became when her attempt to convince Korr to turn to the dark side failed, and she reacted by slicing off Penin's arm. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Tavion has taught me many things as well, you sanctimonious fool!|Alora, when confronting Jaden Korr for the last time|}} [[File:RoshChop.jpg|thumb|right|Alora utilizing Jar'Kai on Rosh Penin]] Alora was a very fast learner and picked up all that her Master taught her. She was flexible, agile, and feminine which was reflected in her acrobatic, graceful lightsaber styles. Focusing on [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], she wielded a red-bladed [[Adept (hilt)|Adept]] lightsaber and utilized the [[Fast style]] of the [[New Jedi Order]]. After her duel with Korr on Hoth, she began using an additional red-bladed Adept lightsaber and became extremely deadly with the [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]] style of combat. In addition, Alora was very skilled in the use of [[Force jump/Legends|Force Jump]], [[Force speed/Legends|Force speed]] and [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]]. Although she did not use dark side Force powers frequently, she did demonstrate proficiency in the use of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] and [[Force Enrage|Force rage]]. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:TotallyPracticalDarkJediUniform-JAMV.png|thumb|right|320x320px|Alora's inactive alternate model]] Alora first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' and was voiced by [[Grey Griffin|Grey DeLisle]]. In the video game, Alora is the only character to have a different animation for [[Force jump/Legends|Force Jump]]. Her version is a forward cartwheel while the standard animation for all other characters is a somersault. She can also perform a unique saber throw, throwing both her lightsabers at the same time and has a different taunt animation, briefly levitating and spinning both her blades. If the player chooses the [[Canon|non-canon]] dark side path in ''Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'', Alora commends Korr for killing Penin. However, Korr feels the Scepter should belong to him and Alora still engages him in a duel. A second Alora model and skin exists in the game files and is available for use in multiplayer, but the code for her alternate appearance to be used when Korr meets Alora on Taspir III is commented out in favor of reusing her primary attire. There are no comments in the code justifying the reason for this and it is easily changed with a third-party modification.Editing GameData\base\assets1.pk3\ext_data\npcs\alora.npc in the ''Jedi Academy'' data files to comment out playerModel alora and uncomment playerModel alora2 for the alora_dual NPC will apply this change. A mod exists to enable this change at [http://www.gamefront.com/files/16046321/Alora2_SP_Fix GameFront]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Alora |es=Alora |pl=Alora }} [[Category:Dark Jedi]] [[Category:Disciples of Ragnos members]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Lethan Twi'leks]] [[Category:Sith acolytes and apprentices]]
